name: Customer Management
definition: The set of activities related to managing customer accounts and their associated data.
emb_input: Business concept: Customer Management. Definition: The set of activities related to managing customer accounts and their associated data. Activities: Customer Registration; Update Customer Records. Performed by: Staff, New Customers. Data artifacts produced: —.

name: Film Catalog Management
definition: The set of activities related to managing the film catalog, including registration and updates.
emb_input: Business concept: Film Catalog Management. Definition: The set of activities related to managing the film catalog, including registration and updates. Activities: Register New Films; Update Film Details. Performed by: Product Managers. Data artifacts produced: —.

name: Category Assignment
definition: The set of activities related to categorizing films for easy browsing and organization.
emb_input: Business concept: Category Assignment. Definition: The set of activities related to categorizing films for easy browsing and organization. Activities: Assign Films to Categories. Performed by: Product Managers. Data artifacts produced: —.

name: Inventory Management
definition: The set of activities related to tracking and updating film inventory levels.
activities: Update Inventory When Films Are Rented or Returned
emb_input: Business concept: Inventory Management. Definition: The set of activities related to tracking and updating film inventory levels. Activities: Update Film Availability; Update Inventory When Films Are Rented or Returned. Performed by: Warehouse Staff, Sales Representatives. Data artifacts produced: —.

name: Rental Processing
definition: The set of activities related to processing film rentals and recording relevant details.
emb_input: Business concept: Rental Processing. Definition: The set of activities related to processing film rentals and recording relevant details. Activities: Place Rental Requests; Process the Rental. Performed by: Customers, Sales Representatives. Data artifacts produced: —.
